en.text: probably a patronymic from an unused name derived from H0559 in the sense of publicity, i.e. prominence; thus, a mountaineer; an Emorite, one of the Canaanitish tribes

senses.gloss_en: probably a patronymic from an unused name derived from H0559 in the sense of publicity, i.e. prominence; thus, a mountaineer; an Emorite, one of the Canaanitish tribes
